parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title DeTrace Creature connection
header DeTrace

participant "Wheel_1" as W1 <<Creature: Wheel>>
participant "Wheel_1" as W1B <<Creature: BBBBB>>
participant "Wheel_2" as W2 <<Creature: Wheel>>
participant "B_1" as B1
participant "Wheel_3" as W3 <<Creature: Wheel>>
participant "Wheel_4" as W4 <<Creature: Wheel>>
participant "Wheel_5" as W5 <<Creature: Wheel>>
participant "Frame" as F <<Creature: Frame>>

activate W1
W1 -> W2 : 1 changeOwner
activate W2
W2 -> W2 : 2 checkMatrix
W2 -> W2 : 3 checkSlot
W2 -> W2 : 4 checkOwner
W2 ->x W1 : 5 connectError
deactivate W1

activate W1B
W1B -> B1 : 6 cdcdcdcdcd
activate B1
deactivate W1B
deactivate W2
deactivate B1

activate W3
W3 -> F : 1 changeOwner
activate F
F -> F : 2 checkMatrix
F -> F : 3 checkOwner
F -> F : 4 checkSlot
F -> W3 : 5 connect
deactivate W3

activate W4
W4 -> F : 6 changeOwner
F -> F : 7 checkMatrix
F -> F : 8 checkOwner
F -> F : 9 checkSlot
F -> W4 : 10 connect
deactivate W4

activate W5
W5 -> F : 11 changeOwner
F -> F : 12 checkMatrix
F -> F : 13 checkOwner
F -> F : 14 checkSlot
F ->x W5 : 15 connect
deactivate W5
deactivate F

@enduml
```
